title: GlyphManifest
description: The generated glyph registry at frontend/public/assets/glyphs/index.json (v2). Bundle-shipped, rewrite-in-place, no migration. GENERATED every build by tools/bake_glyphs.py from the asset tree - never hand-kept. Each pack is a puzzle DIMENSION, each slug a value; slug = [a-z0-9]+ (kebab hyphens dropped), file = the real lowercase-kebab filename, label = derived. generatedAt is provenance only (excluded from any determinism hash).

evolution.change: Initial GlyphManifest v1: a hand-kept list mapping pack.slug -> file/label.
evolution.why: First registry of the theme assets so the frontend + generator reference glyphs by id, never by inline SVG (CLAUDE.md #6, #10).

evolution.change: GlyphManifest v2 (schemaVersion 2): { schemaVersion:2, generatedAt, packs:{ <pack>:{ <slug>:{ file, label } } } }, auto-discovered from the asset tree by tools/bake_glyphs.py. Bake fails on a non-kebab filename, a slug collision, or an SVG over config/budgets.json glyphs.max_svg_bytes.
evolution.why: The v1 hand list had gone stale with dangling refs (deleted color/violet.svg, household/cola.svg); generating the manifest keeps it honest and lets a new collection folder join the next build with no code change.
